api_key.description: Survicate Data Export API key (Survicate panel > Surveys Settings > Access Keys), sent verbatim as 'Authorization: Basic <api_key>' per Survicate's documented scheme (docs.survicate.com/data-export/setup: 'The format for this should be Basic {{apiKey}}' -- a raw key, NOT base64-encoded user:pass HTTP Basic auth). Never logged.

base_url.description: Survicate Data Export API base URL override for tests or proxies. Current documented API version is v2.
